views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Today's medication overview showing adherence ring, active medications list with take/skip actions, current streak, and quick-log FAB. Each medication row shows scheduled time, dosage, and status badge.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick dose-logging modal. Medication name with autocomplete from history, form picker with icons, dosage amount stepper with unit picker, scheduled time, adherence status selector, with-food toggle, side effect toggle, and notes field.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by daily adherence rate (green=100%, yellow=partial, red=missed). Tapping a day shows all doses for that date grouped by medication. Filter by specific medication. Swipeable month navigation.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: 7/30/90-day adherence trend line chart, per-medication adherence bar chart, time-of-day distribution showing when doses are most often missed, side effect frequency tracker, and AI-generated insights about patterns (e.g., 'You miss evening doses 3x more than morning').

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayDoses
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All dose entries logged today, sorted by scheduledTime

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of today's doses with status onTime out of total today doses (onTime + late + missed + skipped). Returns 1.0 if no doses today.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of doses taken on time or late (not missed/skipped) over the past 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyAdherenceRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Same calculation over past 30 days for trend comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days ending today where every logged dose has status onTime or late (no missed doses). A day with zero entries breaks the streak.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: longestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Maximum adherence streak ever recorded across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniqueMedications
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Distinct medication names from all entries, sorted alphabetically, used for filter dropdowns and per-med analytics

viewModelComputedProperties.name: adherenceByMedication
viewModelComputedProperties.description: For each unique medication, compute adherence rate (onTime+late / total). Sorted by adherence ascending to highlight problem medications first.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily adherence rate for the past 7 days as (date, rate) tuples for line chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily adherence rate for past 30 days for the extended trend chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostMissedTimeSlot
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Categorize scheduledTime into Morning (5-12), Afternoon (12-17), Evening (17-21), Night (21-5). Return the slot with highest miss rate.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sideEffectRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of all dose entries where sideEffectNoted is true

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayDoseCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of doses logged today for the stat grid

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of human-readable insight strings generated from data patterns: streak milestones, adherence changes week-over-week, most/least adherent medications, time-slot vulnerability, side effect correlations

dailyGoal.description: Target number of scheduled medication doses per day. Unlike hydration where everyone has a similar goal, this is highly individual. Default represents a common multi-medication regimen.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if at least one dose was logged AND zero doses have adherenceStatus == .missed. Days with only .onTime and .late statuses are streak-valid. A day with no entries at all breaks the streak (implies all doses were missed).
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Primary metric: weekly adherence rate compared to previous week (delta percentage). Secondary: per-medication adherence trend (improving vs declining). Tertiary: time-of-day pattern analysis — compute miss rate by 4 time slots (morning/afternoon/evening/night) to identify vulnerable windows. Flag any medication where adherence drops below 80% in the past 7 days.
insights: Week-over-week adherence change: 'Your adherence improved 12% this week vs last week'
Time vulnerability: 'Evening doses are missed 3x more often than morning doses'
Per-medication alert: 'Metformin adherence dropped to 60% this week — down from 90% last week'
Side effect correlation: '40% of Ibuprofen doses had side effects noted — consider discussing with your doctor'
Consistency recognition: 'You've taken all morning medications on time for 14 consecutive days'
With-food pattern: '70% of doses marked as taken without food — check if any require food'
Weekend vs weekday: 'Your weekend adherence (65%) is significantly lower than weekdays (92%)'
